title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 21 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 21 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 21 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 21/01/2026
Today, the iron ore futures market experienced volatile and slightly weaker movements. The main contract I2605closed at 784 yuan/ton, down 0.32% from the previous trading day. Spot prices also saw a slight decline of about 1-2 yuan/ton compared to the previous day.
